name: Catena AB (publ)
summary: Catena AB (publ) operates as a logistics property company in Sweden. It owns, develops, manages, and sells logistics properties. The company serves logistics companies. As of December 31, 2020, its property portfolio comprised 113 logistics properties located primarily in southern and central Sweden with a total lettable area of approximately 1,947,537 square meters. It operates in the regions of Gothenburg, Helsingborg, J√É¬∂nk√É¬∂ping, Malm√É¬∂, and Stockholm. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Helsingborg, Sweden.
